title: The Crime Nobody Saw
writer: Frederic Dannay, Manfred Lee, Lowell Brentano
actors: Lew Ayres, Ruth Coleman, Eugene Pallette
plot: Three play-authors, Horace Dryden, Nick Milburn and "Babe" Lawton, are in an apartment seeking a plot for a new play. They are still on Page 1 when an intoxicated man wanders into their room, collapses and they, looking for identi...
